news.t: Invesco S&P 500 Low Volatility ETF Rated Best Among Smart Beta ETFs To Diversify During COVID Times
Small-Cap Stocks Set to Deliver a Stellar Performance in 2020

holdings.infoBox: XSLV is an equity ETF with a total of 120 individual holdings. The top holdings are Phillips Edison & Company stock at 1.27%, Four Corners Property Trust at 1.16%, Broadstone Net Lease at 1.12%, Avista at 1.10%, and Ellington Financial at 1.10%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Low Volatility ETF (XSLV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P SmallCap 600 Low Volatility index. The fund tracks a volatility-weighted index of the 120 least volatile securities from the S&P 600. XSLV was launched on Feb 15, 2013 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco S&P 500 Low Volatility ETF Rated Best Among Smart Beta ETFs To Diversify During COVID Times
data.text: Q.ai's deep learning algorithms have identified several US Low Volatility Smart Beta ETFs based on fund flows over the last 90-days, 30-days, and 7-days.

data.title: Small-Cap Stocks Set to Deliver a Stellar Performance in 2020
data.text: Small-cap stocks, or companies with a market capitalization of less than $1 billion, are presumed to provide higher returns at a comparatively higher risk than large-cap stocks.
